summary: Iteration 61 - Multi-language (EN+ES) i18n Testing. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend language switcher, locale persistence, and URL ?lang= parameter all working correctly after a bug fix to i18n.js. LocalizedField component in AurexSectionsManager shows EN/ES tabs correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: i18n.js: Fixed timing issue where useState initializer ran before settings loaded, causing localStorage/URL param to be ignored
i18n.js: Added 'initialized' state to ensure locale is only resolved once after settings load
i18n.js: useEffect now re-checks URL param and localStorage after settings.languages is populated
LocalizedField.js: Correctly imports from '../../lib/i18n' (path was fixed in previous session)
LocalizedField.js: Shows EN/ES tabs with green dot indicator for translated fields
AurexSections.js: All sections use tt() hook for localized text rendering
HeroSection.js: Uses tt() for slide title, subtitle, description, button_text
LanguageSwitcher.js: Correctly hides when enabled.length <= 1 (single-language mode)
Backend aurex_sections.py: Transparently stores/returns dict values like {en: ..., es: ...}
seed_data_creation: aurex_audience config already seeded with {en, es} values for title, subtitle, cta_text
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language (EN+ES) i18n fully working. Key features verified: (1) Language switcher visible in navbar when 2+ languages enabled, (2) Clicking ES option switches all tt()-wrapped text to Spanish, (3) localStorage 'aurex_locale' persists across page reloads, (4) URL ?lang=es forces Spanish locale, (5) LocalizedField in AurexSectionsManager shows EN/ES tabs with translation indicators, (6) Backend PUT/GET for aurex config/items preserves {en, es} dict values, (7) Public /api/public/settings returns languages and default_language. Bug fixed: i18n.js useState initializer was running before settings loaded, causing locale to reset to 'en' on reload. Fixed by adding useEffect that re-checks locale after settings load.

backend: GET /api/public/aurex/aurex_audience returns config with {en, es} title/subtitle/cta_text
All 8 Aurex section public endpoints return valid data
frontend: Language switcher visible when 2+ languages enabled
Language switcher dropdown shows English EN and Español ES options
Clicking ES switches aurex_audience title from 'Aurex is for you' to 'Aurex es para ti'
Clicking EN switches back to English
LocalizedField in AurexSectionsManager shows EN/ES tabs
LocalizedField ES tab shows Spanish translation 'Aurex es para ti'
LocalizedField shows green dot indicator for translated fields

bug_fixed.issue: Locale not persisting across page reloads and URL ?lang= parameter not working
bug_fixed.root_cause: useState initializer in LanguageProvider ran before settings were loaded, so enabled.includes(candidate) always returned false for 'es'
bug_fixed.fix: Added useEffect that re-checks URL param and localStorage after settings.languages is populated, with 'initialized' flag to prevent re-running
